name: tabby-scroll-guard
description: Prevents accidental scroll-up in Tabby terminal during active output (e.g., Claude Code sessions)
author: tabby-scroll-guard

scripts.deploy: npm run build && mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Application Support/tabby/plugins/node_modules/tabby-scroll-guard/dist" && cp dist/index.js dist/index.js.map "$HOME/Library/Application Support/tabby/plugins/node_modules/tabby-scroll-guard/dist/" && cp package.json "$HOME/Library/Application Support/tabby/plugins/node_modules/tabby-scroll-guard/package.json" && echo 'Deployed. Restart Tabby to load.'
